proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_enzalutamide.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_abiraterone.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_docetaxel.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_lu177_psma.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.728 (on, n=20076) vs 3.755 (off, n=29924); Welch t-test.
Mean PFS 3.829 vs 3.735; +0.094 months on olaparib (small but significant).
Mean PFS 3.805 vs 3.741; trend toward benefit but NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In brca2_mutation-positive patients, treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months more than in brca2_mutation-negative patients (positive interaction effect on PFS scale).
In msi_high-positive patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months more than in msi_high-negative patients.
In psma_high-positive patients, treatment_lu177_psma increases pfs_months more than in psma_high-negative patients.
In ar_v7_positive patients, treatment_enzalutamide is less effective (smaller increase or even decrease in pfs_months) than in ar_v7-negative patients.
In ar_v7_positive patients, treatment_abiraterone is less effective (smaller increase or even decrease in pfs_months) than in ar_v7-negative patients.
treatment_docetaxel is more effective (greater increase in pfs_months) in patients with visceral_mets than in patients without visceral_mets.
tp53_mutation modifies the effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months.
tp53_mutation modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ const + treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Strong positive interaction: +1.62 months PFS for olaparib in BRCA2+. Subgroup means: BRCA2+ on=5.22, BRCA2+ off=3.67, BRCA2- on=3.67, BRCA2- off=3.74.
No significant interaction; estimate slightly negative.
No interaction detected (p=0.96). AR-V7 does not modify enzalutamide effect.
No interaction; tp53 does not modify olaparib effect.
No interaction; tp53 does not modify pembrolizumab effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps predicts lower pfs_months (poor performance status associated with worse PFS).
Older age_years is associated with lower pfs_months (older patients have worse PFS).
Higher psa_ng_ml predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher gleason_score predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher albumin_g_dl predicts higher pfs_months (better nutritional status, better PFS).
Higher ldh_u_l predicts lower pfs_months (high tumor-burden marker).
mcrpc-positive patients have lower pfs_months than mcrpc-negative patients.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy predicts lower pfs_months.
visceral_mets-positive patients have lower pfs_months than visceral_mets-negative patients.
liver_mets-positive patients have lower pfs_months than liver_mets-negative patients.
bone_mets-positive patients have lower pfs_months than bone_mets-negative patients.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl predicts higher pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Strong negative: each unit ECOG = -1.16 months PFS.
Counterintuitive POSITIVE association: each year of age = +0.174 months PFS. Mean PFS by age strata: <55y=1.17, 55-65y=2.89, 65-75y=4.56, >=75y=6.46.
Negative: each ng/mL PSA = -0.0033 months PFS.
Strong positive: each g/dL albumin = +0.495 months PFS.
mCRPC patients have -0.52 months PFS vs hormone-sensitive.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS for pfs_months that includes ecog_ps, age_years, psa_ng_ml, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, hemoglobin_g_dl, mcrpc, visceral_mets, liver_mets, bone_mets, weight_loss_pct_6mo, prior_lines_of_therapy, brca2_mutation, msi_high, psma_high, ar_v7_positive, and the six treatment indicators, ecog_ps remains a strong negative predictor of pfs_months.

In the multivariable model, the positive age_years effect on pfs_months persists after adjustment for performance status, mCRPC status, and laboratory markers (i.e., not explained away by other prognostic features).
In the multivariable model (without an explicit BRCA2 interaction term), treatment_olaparib retains a positive main effect on pfs_months.
In the multivariable model, treatment_enzalutamide, treatment_abiraterone, treatment_docetaxel, treatment_lu177_psma, and treatment_pembrolizumab show no significant main effects on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Joint multivariable model R^2=0.9475. Strongest signed coefficients (effect on PFS months): ecog_ps -1.152 (p<1e-300), age_years +0.174 (p<1e-300), albumin_g_dl +0.478, log/raw psa negative, ldh_u_l -0.0005, mcrpc -0.375, weight_loss_pct_6mo -0.077, brca2_mutation +0.154, treatment_olaparib +0.146; treatments enzalutamide/abiraterone/docetaxel/lu177/pembro all NS.
ecog_ps coefficient -1.152 (p essentially 0). Strong and independent.
age_years coefficient +0.174 (p essentially 0). Adjusted age effect identical to univariable.
treatment_olaparib main coefficient +0.146 (t=21, p<1e-100). Captured by BRCA2-positive subset.
All five non-olaparib treatments NS (|t|<2). No evidence of independent treatment effect for enz/abi/doce/Lu177/pembro.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher calcium_mg_dl predicts lower pfs_months (hypercalcemia of malignancy).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher cea_ng_ml predicts lower pfs_months.
Higher bmi predicts higher pfs_months.
diabetes_mellitus is associated with lower pfs_months.
chronic_kidney_disease is associated with lower pfs_months.
heart_failure is associated with lower pfs_months.
copd is associated with lower pfs_months.
depression_anxiety_diagnosis is associated with lower pfs_months.
prior_malignancy is associated with lower pfs_months.
hiv_positive is associated with lower pfs_months.
venous_thromboembolism_history is associated with lower pfs_months.
At least one of the 25 candidate SNPs (snp_rs1045642 ... snp_rs2070744) is associated with pfs_months at unadjusted p<0.05.
snp_rs4986893 is associated with lower pfs_months.
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with pfs_months.
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR) is associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: loop OLS: pfs ~ snp_X for all 25 SNPs
analyses.result_summary: Only snp_rs4986893 reaches unadjusted p<0.05 (p=0.014). No SNP survives Bonferroni correction (alpha 0.002 for 25 tests).
Carriers have -0.092 months PFS (p=0.014). Does not survive multiple testing.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, fatigue_grade independently predicts pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Fatigue not significant after adjusting for ECOG.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mcrpc=0), treatment_docetaxel produces lower pfs_months than no docetaxel.
In hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mcrpc=0), treatment_olaparib produces higher pfs_months than no olaparib.
In mCRPC patients (mcrpc=1), treatment_enzalutamide produces lower pfs_months than no enzalutamide.
In mCRPC patients (mcrpc=1), treatment_olaparib produces higher pfs_months than no olaparib.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by docetaxel within mcrpc=0
t-test pfs by olaparib within mcrpc=0
t-test pfs by enzalutamide within mcrpc=1
analyses.result_summary: Enzalutamide -0.049 months in mCRPC (p=0.049). Counterintuitive small negative.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by olaparib within mcrpc=1

proposed_hypotheses.text: In brca2_mutation-positive patients, treatment_olaparib produces a clinically meaningful (>1 month) increase in pfs_months relative to no olaparib.
In brca2_mutation-negative patients, treatment_olaparib does not improve pfs_months (i.e., the BRCA2 × olaparib interaction is fully predictive, with no benefit in BRCA2-).

analyses.code: t-test pfs by olaparib within brca2_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ olaparib on (n=529) mean PFS=5.22, off (n=4467) mean=3.67; diff +1.545, p=4e-27.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by olaparib within brca2_mutation=0
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2- olaparib on (n=4569) mean=3.67, off (n=40435) mean=3.74; diff -0.073, p=0.019. Small negative — slight harm/no benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is smaller in patients with higher ecog_ps (negative ECOG × olaparib interaction).
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is smaller in patients with higher ecog_ps.
None of the six treatments shows a statistically significant ecog_ps × treatment interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.code: loop OLS: pfs ~ T + ecog + T*ecog for 6 treatments
analyses.result_summary: All six interactions NS at alpha=0.05; smallest p=0.29 (enzalutamide). Confirms uniform null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: log(1+psa_ng_ml) is a stronger negative predictor of pfs_months (per natural unit change) than raw psa_ng_ml.
The albumin_g_dl association with pfs_months is similar in magnitude in mcrpc=0 and mcrpc=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: log_PSA beta=-0.382 (p<1e-300); per natural log unit far larger absolute change in PFS than raw PSA scale.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs ~ albumin within each mcrpc stratum
analyses.result_summary: Albumin beta in mcrpc=0: +0.486 (p=2e-73); in mcrpc=1: +0.508 (p=2e-100). Magnitudes nearly identical.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with bone_mets, treatment_lu177_psma improves pfs_months more than in patients without bone_mets.
In mCRPC patients, ar_v7_positive interacts with treatment_abiraterone such that AR-V7+ patients gain less PFS from abiraterone (negative interaction).
In mCRPC patients, ar_v7_positive interacts with treatment_enzalutamide such that AR-V7+ patients gain less PFS from enzalutamide.
In mCRPC patients, psma_high interacts positively with treatment_lu177_psma to produce greater PFS benefit.
In mCRPC patients, msi_high interacts positively with treatment_pembrolizumab to produce greater PFS benefit.
In non-mCRPC patients, visceral_mets modifies the treatment_docetaxel effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS in mcrpc=1: pfs ~ abi + arv7 + abi*arv7
OLS in mcrpc=1: pfs ~ enz + arv7 + enz*arv7
OLS in mcrpc=1: pfs ~ lu177 + psma + lu177*psma
analyses.result_summary: Interaction NS (p=0.87). PSMA-high does not predict benefit from Lu177-PSMA in this dataset.

analyses.code: OLS in mcrpc=1: pfs ~ pembro + msi + pembro*msi
analyses.result_summary: Interaction NS (p=0.72). MSI-high does not predict pembro benefit here.

analyses.code: OLS in mcrpc=0: pfs ~ doce + visceral + doce*visceral

proposed_hypotheses.text: The brca2_mutation × treatment_olaparib interaction effect on pfs_months is similar in magnitude in non-mCRPC (mcrpc=0) and mCRPC (mcrpc=1) subgroups (effect generalizes across disease state).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs ~ olap + brca2 + olap*brca2 within each mcrpc stratum
analyses.result_summary: Interaction in mcrpc=0: +1.627 months (p=1.3e-28). Interaction in mcrpc=1: +1.630 months (p=6e-36). Effect virtually identical across mCRPC status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs4986893 modifies the effect of one or more of the six treatments on pfs_months (potential pharmacogenomic interaction).

analyses.code: loop OLS: pfs ~ T + snp_rs4986893 + T*snp_rs4986893 for 6 treatments
analyses.result_summary: None of the 6 treatment × snp interactions reach p<0.05 (smallest p=0.097 for docetaxel × rs4986893). No clear pharmacogenomic signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between age_years and pfs_months is approximately monotonic across age strata (<55, 55-65, 65-75, >=75).
The positive age effect persists after multivariable adjustment for ecog_ps, mcrpc, albumin_g_dl, weight_loss_pct_6mo, psa_ng_ml, ldh_u_l (i.e., not explained by competing prognostic features).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS by age bin: <55=1.17 (n=7995), 55-65=2.89 (n=17148), 65-75=4.56 (n=16950), >=75=6.46 (n=7907). Strictly monotonically increasing, ~5.3-month gradient.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs ~ age + ecog + mcrpc + albumin + weight_loss + psa + ldh
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted age beta=+0.174 per year (p<1e-300), unchanged from univariable. Effect not explained by these covariates.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in a composite high-risk profile (ecog_ps>=1 AND albumin_g_dl<3.5 AND ldh_u_l>250 AND weight_loss_pct_6mo>5 AND mcrpc=1) have markedly lower pfs_months than patients in a composite low-risk profile (ecog_ps=0 AND albumin_g_dl>=4.0 AND ldh_u_l<=200 AND weight_loss_pct_6mo<=2 AND mcrpc=0).

analyses.code: compare PFS between composite high- and low-risk groups
analyses.result_summary: High-risk (n=449): mean PFS 2.34. Low-risk (n=561): mean PFS 5.58. Difference -3.23 months, p=2e-131.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher years_since_diagnosis is associated with lower pfs_months (longer disease duration → worse residual prognosis).

In a multivariable OLS for pfs_months including ecog_ps, age_years, log(1+psa_ng_ml), albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, mcrpc, visceral_mets, weight_loss_pct_6mo, brca2_mutation, treatment_olaparib, and brca2_mutation*treatment_olaparib, the BRCA2 × olaparib interaction is the dominant predictive signal (>=+1.4 months) and the main treatment_olaparib effect is null in BRCA2-negative patients.

analyses.code: sm.OLS final adjusted model with brca2*olaparib interaction
analyses.result_summary: R^2=0.9748. brca2:olaparib interaction +1.43 (p essentially 0). treatment_olaparib main effect ~0 in BRCA2- baseline. brca2_mutation main ~0. ecog_ps -1.151. age +0.174. log_psa -0.383. albumin +0.478. ldh -0.0005. weight_loss -0.077. mcrpc ~0 (explained away by other features). visceral_mets -0.015 (modest).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation-positive patients, the PFS benefit from treatment_olaparib is similar across race_ethnicity strata (white, black, hispanic, asian) — i.e., no racial heterogeneity of benefit.

analyses.code: by-race t-tests of olaparib effect within brca2=1
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib effect in BRCA2+ by race: white +1.61 (p=1e-20, n_olap=355/n_off=2896), black +1.67 (p=7e-5), hispanic +1.02 (p=0.007), asian +1.54 (p=0.028). Magnitudes broadly comparable; no clear effect heterogeneity by race.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation-positive patients, the PFS benefit from treatment_olaparib does not meaningfully differ by insurance_type (medicare, medicaid, private, uninsured).

analyses.code: by-insurance t-tests of olaparib effect within brca2=1
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib effect in BRCA2+ by insurance: medicaid +1.89 (p=5e-7), medicare +1.41 (p=2e-10), private +1.63 (p=4e-12), uninsured +1.01 (NS, n=24). Magnitudes consistent; benefit observed in all insured strata.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation-positive patients, the PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is similar across ecog_ps strata (0, 1, 2).

analyses.code: by-ECOG t-tests of olaparib in brca2=1
analyses.result_summary: ECOG=0: +1.69 (p=9e-13). ECOG=1: +1.43 (p=4e-13). ECOG=2: +1.66 (p=7e-7). Highly consistent benefit irrespective of performance status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, albumin_g_dl, mcrpc, nlr remains an independent negative predictor of pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, albumin_g_dl, mcrpc, crp_mg_l remains an independent negative predictor of pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs ~ nlr + ecog + albumin + mcrpc
OLS: pfs ~ crp + ecog + albumin + mcrpc

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a significant three-way brca2_mutation × treatment_olaparib × mcrpc interaction on pfs_months (i.e., the predictive olaparib benefit in BRCA2+ differs by mCRPC status).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs ~ brca2 + olap + mcrpc + brca2:olap + brca2:mcrpc + olap:mcrpc + brca2:olap:mcrpc
analyses.result_summary: Three-way interaction NS (p=0.99). The BRCA2 × olaparib effect is NOT modified by mCRPC status, consistent with iteration 14.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation-positive patients on treatment_olaparib, concomitant treatment_docetaxel is associated with lower pfs_months than olaparib without docetaxel.
Among brca2_mutation-positive patients on treatment_olaparib, concomitant treatment_enzalutamide is associated with similar pfs_months as olaparib without enzalutamide.
There are no overall differences in pfs_months across race_ethnicity, insurance_type, or rural_residence categories at the cohort level (no demographic disparity in PFS).

analyses.code: t-test pfs by docetaxel within BRCA2+ olaparib users
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ olap+doce mean=4.77 (n=157) vs olap-only mean=5.40 (n=372); diff -0.63, p=0.027.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by enz within BRCA2+ olaparib users
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ olap+enz mean=5.14 vs olap-only mean=5.27; diff -0.13, NS (p=0.63).

analyses.code: ANOVA pfs by race; ANOVA by insurance; t-test rural vs urban
analyses.result_summary: Race ANOVA F=0.56, p=0.69. Insurance ANOVA F=0.34, p=0.79. Rural vs urban diff=+0.015, p=0.50. No demographic differences in PFS.
